result:
Done. Here's what was added:

**Interactive cell editor mode** — press `e` to enter (auto-pauses the simulation):

- **Arrow keys** — move cursor (wraps around edges)
- **Enter/Space** — toggle cell alive/dead
- **`c`** — clear the entire grid
- **`e`** — exit editor and return to normal (paused) mode

The cursor is shown as a highlighted cell (yellow background on dead cells, green background on live cells) using two new color pairs. The status bar updates to show editor-specific controls and the current cursor position. The grid rendering was changed from line-at-a-time to cell-at-a-time to support per-cell cursor highlighting.
